brief_summary: Time-axis chart showing three sage-green readiness curves rising from 2021 to 2026, each crossing a horizontal 'usable threshold' dashed line. Curves labelled on the right: ZMK wireless firmware, choc-spaced keycaps, pre-built hotswap split supply. Caption: 'none existed at saturation in 2021 — all three sit usable in 2026'.
data_sources: split-ergo-cohort.mdx § 'Why now and not five years ago' — 'The first is firmware: ZMK's wireless story caught up to QMK's feature set ... The second is keycaps: choc-spaced sets and sculpted MT3 alternatives ... The third is supply: pre-built, hot-swap, in-stock split SKUs ... None of those forces existed at saturation in 2021. All three are sitting at usable in 2026.'
